data.title: General Dynamics to webcast 2025 third-quarter financial results conference call on October 24, starting at 9 a.m. EDT.
data.description: General Dynamics, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GD, is set to broadcast its third-quarter financial results conference call on Friday, October 24, at 9 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time. Interested parties can access the live webcast of the call on the company's website, www.gd.com. For those unable to tune in live, a replay of the conference call will also be accessible.

data.title: Study shows >99.9% PFAS removal efficiency during reactivation of spent drinking water carbon by Calgon Carbon.
data.description: The latest breakthrough in environmental technology has demonstrated an incredible efficiency rate of over 99.9% in destroying and removing PFAS contaminants. This milestone was reached through the full-scale thermal reactivation process of spent drinking water carbon under Calgon Carbon's standard operating protocols, utilizing OTM-45's rigorous calculation approach. The innovative method successfully eliminates PFAS from the spent carbon to undetectable levels, marking a significant advancement in environmental remediation efforts.

data.title: CME Group plans to launch 24/7 cryptocurrency futures trading in 2026 pending regulatory approval.
data.description: CME Group (NASDAQ: CME) has revealed plans to introduce 24/7 trading for cryptocurrency futures and options starting in early 2026, subject to regulatory clearance. The trading activity will take place on CME Globex, with a short weekend maintenance break. Transactions occurring between Friday evening and Sunday evening will be dated for the following business day, and all clearing and reporting will be managed accordingly. Visit Benzinga.com for detailed coverage.

data.title: Madison Liquidators' "Giveaway Madness" event offers over $13,000 worth of office furniture prizes.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, on October 2, 2025, Madison Liquidators has introduced the thrilling Giveaway Madness event, set to occur from October 1 to December 31, 2025. This special promotion will distribute over $13,000 worth of premium office supplies and furniture.

data.title: DoubleZero protocol debuts mainnet-beta for secure crypto communication, aiming to enhance blockchain speed & reduce reliance on public internet.
data.description: The goal of the DoubleZero network is to lessen the dependence of blockchain on public internet infrastructure, which typically causes speed limitations.

data.title: Bozeman, Montana experiences explosive growth due to Yellowstone fame and remote work trends.
data.description: In recent developments, the Montana Real Estate Group has observed significant transformations in Bozeman, Montana as of October 2, 2025. Known as "the last best place," Bozeman exemplifies the beauty of Montana, nestled in a valley encircled by breathtaking mountains. This location serves as a splendid outdoor recreational area, attracting numerous individuals seeking adventure and natural beauty.

data.title: Berwyn Group appoints Jennifer Oline as GM of Financial Services, leading provider of death audit and data services.
data.description: Independence, Ohio - October 2, 2025 - The prominent death audit and data verification services provider, Berwyn Group, has welcomed Jennifer Oline as the new General Manager of Financial Services. This appointment comes as Berwyn continues to solidify its position in the industry. With an extensive suite of top-tier services, Berwyn Group remains a frontrunner in the field.

data.title: Bankruptcy attorney Katie Lasky joins Jones Walker LLP in New Orleans as partner in Litigation Practice Group.
data.description: Jones Walker LLP has recently announced the addition of Katie Lasky as a new partner in the Litigation Practice Group in their New Orleans office, specializing in bankruptcy & restructuring. This move signifies the firm's commitment to expanding its services in this area. The addition of Lasky, an experienced professional, is expected to further strengthen the firm's capabilities in handling bankruptcy-related cases. This development comes as part of Jones Walker LLP's strategy to enhance its presence in the legal market.

data.title: Buyers Edge Platform names Rohini Shankar new Chief People Officer to lead global people strategy.
data.description: In Lake Worth, Florida, on October 2, 2025, Buyers Edge Platform (BEP), a prominent foodservice procurement and analytics platform, revealed the selection of Rohini Shankar as its latest Chief People Officer. Taking on this position, Shankar will direct the company's worldwide people strategy.
